name: Redelivery Slot Booked
description: Customer agreed to a specific redelivery date and time window

name: Address Corrected
description: Customer provided a corrected delivery address

name: Will Pickup
description: Customer will collect the parcel from the warehouse / hub

name: Canceled by Customer
description: Customer explicitly requested to cancel the order

name: Escalated to Human
description: Issue could not be resolved by AI — routed to human agent

name: Unreachable
description: Customer did not answer or the call failed repeatedly
